task_completion.description: Create at least three HVAC duct segments (IfcDuctSegment).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender outliner or 3D viewport, there should be at least three new objects representing duct segments (typically named with IfcDuctSegment).

task_completion.description: Create at least three plumbing pipe segments (IfcPipeSegment).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Blender outliner or 3D viewport, there should be at least three new objects representing pipe segments (typically named with IfcPipeSegment).

task_completion.description: Create a distribution system named 'HVAC Supply Air' and assign the duct segments to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Bonsai/BlenderBIM Systems or Groups panel, a system named 'HVAC Supply Air' (IfcDistributionSystem) is visible, and the duct segments are shown as its members or assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Create a distribution system named 'Domestic Cold Water' and assign the pipe segments to it.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Bonsai/BlenderBIM Systems or Groups panel, a system named 'Domestic Cold Water' (IfcDistributionSystem) is visible, and the pipe segments are shown as its members or assigned to it.

task_completion.description: Ensure existing architectural elements are not deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The original FZK-Haus architectural elements (like walls, roof, slabs) remain visible in the 3D viewport and outliner alongside the new MEP elements.

task_completion.description: Save the updated IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_mep_services.ifc.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, Blender top bar, terminal command, or file manager shows the project being saved as 'fzk_mep_services.ifc' in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the Bonsai (BlenderBIM) GUI to model the MEP elements.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Blender interface with Bonsai add-on panels being actively used to add elements and systems, rather than just running a pre-written script.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the GUI by manually editing the IFC file in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening the IFC file in a text editor (like nano, vim, or gedit) to manually type IFC definitions.

integrity.description: The screenshots show a logical progression of adding elements and systems.
integrity.visual_evidence: The sequence of screenshots demonstrates step-by-step creation of ducts, pipes, and systems within the 3D environment.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Required systems: 'HVAC Supply Air' and 'Domestic Cold Water'. Minimum ducts: 3. Minimum pipes: 3. Expected output file: /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_mep_services.ifc.
